     the Fermi energy is     0.5207 ev

!    total energy              =   -6197.46570781 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.04980104 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -6197.41590677 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -115891.76072433 Ry
     hartree contribution      =   58530.36867174 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -2130.72327524 Ry
